headline: KEX Stock Up 27.6% YTD: Can the Momentum Last Throughout 2026?
summary: Kirby expands its fleet and benefits from strong marine demand, higher pricing and power generation growth, supporting continued momentum.

headline: UPS Harnesses AI to Boost Network Efficiency and Shipment Visibility
